calendar.matters:
Petition For Settlement Of First Account And For Approval Of Trustee And Attorney Fees.
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Braun for and with James Russo (Trustee). Robert Capmbell appeared by telephone for Keith Limnell.

Mr. Campbell stated that the Trust drafted provides a standard of invasion that would deplete the Trust in one year, asked the Court to take judicial notice of Civil case number CGC-08-478635 and addressed fees. Both Counsel submitted the matter on the pleadings. The Petition for Settlement of First Account, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Mann.

Petition For Settlement Of First Account And For Approval Of Trustee And Attorney Fees.
Off Calendar Jun-11-2013 Continued To Jun-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Braun for and with James Russo. Robert Campbell appeared by telephone for Keith Limnell.

Judge Wiss recused herself from the case. The Petition for Settlement of First Account, etc. was continued to June 17, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For Settlement Of First Account And For Approval Of Trustee And Attorney Fees.
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Continued To Jun-11-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
